  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The output identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (batch-formation policy), but does not walk the chain end-to-end or propose minimal repairs for other potential inconsistencies.",
    "R1.3": "The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing detailed analysis of the diagnostic analysis.",
    "RX.1": "The output flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the exact cause of non-determinism), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not."
  },

    "RX.1": 0.7,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The output identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (batch-formation policy), but does not walk the chain end-to-end or propose minimal repairs for other potential inconsistencies.
rationale.R1.3: The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing detailed analysis of the diagnostic analysis.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the exact cause of non-determinism), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not.
